name: BrowserStack (npx)
description: BrowserStack's official MCP server for cross-browser and mobile testing: run automated and manual tests on real devices, debug test failures, manage test runs, and access the App Live, Live, and Automate platforms.

inputs.label: BrowserStack Username
inputs.description: Your BrowserStack account username, found on the Account & Profile settings page.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to BrowserStack
2. Open Account & Profile > Profile (Account Settings)
3. Copy your Username

inputs.label: BrowserStack Access Key
inputs.description: Your BrowserStack access key, found alongside your username on the Account & Profile settings page.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to BrowserStack
2. Open Account & Profile > Profile (Account Settings)
3. Copy your Access Key

auth.instructions: Use your BrowserStack Username and Access Key from Account & Profile > Profile at https://www.browserstack.com/accounts/profile/details
